The Bay Area has no shortage of rinse-and-repeat networking events. However, Brunch & Build is different. 🥂

Created for founders, innovators, creatives, tech professionals and disruptors who demand more out of life.

Join us for a curated rooftop brunch experience featuring brunch bites, a bloom bar, music, and a Fireside Chat with Ryan Sterling, CEO of NerdWallet Wealth Partners, moderated by Taiwo Ade, Content Creator and Sr. UX Researcher at Meta.

We’ll be talking career growth, entrepreneurship, innovation, money, and building a life on your own terms.

Powered by NerdWallet Wealth Partners and Red Bull Basement.

📍 High 5ive Rooftop Bar — Oakland 
📅 May 16 
⏰ 11AM–3PM
🎟️ OTT Members attend free — ask about membership perks + access.

🥂 Meet your Brunch & Build moderator. 
With experience across Meta, LinkedIn, and Etsy, Taiwo Ade sits at the intersection of AI, tech, entrepreneurship, and modern community building — making her the perfect person to lead this conversation with Ryan Sterling, CEO of @nerdwalletwealthpartners.

Whether you’re building a brand or community, curating experiences, growing a business, hosting events, working in tech, wellness, media, hospitality, or creating culture in the Bay Area… this is the room you want to be in!

San Francisco, Fit Fest is back! And this time, we’re taking over The Crossing at East Cut. 🏋🏽‍♀️

This is our BIGGEST Fit Fest YET! We’ve got ELEVEN zones, including multiple group workouts, wellness activations, live DJ sets, recovery zones, competitions, giveaways, and some of the most active and social people in the Bay Area all in one place.

Whether you’re pulling up with your run club, gym crew, workout bae, or just trying to tap into the city’s wellness scene… this is the event everyone’s going to be talking about all summer.

Featuring:
⚡ Group Fitness Classes
⚡ Wellness + Recovery Activations
⚡ DJs + High Energy Experiences
⚡ Giveaways + Brand Pop-Ups
⚡ Bay Area Fitness Community
⚡ Food, Drinks & More

📍The Crossing at East Cut
📅 Saturday, June 27
⏰ 10AM–4PM
